title: Dino's dragons
description: This mod adds dragons to minecraft
body:
## **Dino's dragons**
this mod adds more dragons into minecraft that you can craft.
## **Community**
Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/X92BXwawpf)!
## **The Dragons:**
                                            
### -Stone dragon                                                                      
the stone dragon has more storage space in his inventory.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec85653864a6783185b1506b7d7119e7c0c20b1.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c4e97b3ad5f2d2230ada50e25e08c28e8c08e65.png)
### -poison Wyvern                                                               
the poison Wyvern has a poison attack and drops when killed a poison sword.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65c905f1c38ab7954750e06c94ee86c296e9fa8f.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/890323d573afd2fb2a6f01e1d7d0d5a1475a9e77.png)
### -magma drake                                                                       
the magma drake has the ability to walk on lava and has a fire attack.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f22209a1b1ea5097e56f4f7b7029bb4d7c25c7ae_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/469859932417dc52ea3cf0e856cbd8e39ca9e8a1_0.webp)
### -lightning dragon
the lightning dragon has a thunder attack.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94dc95e5772d61419e7b0aa4daa113999b458f57_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38e1e1c80f743a4095489b66b814e9536e8d4652_0.webp)
the mod will keep updating through the year.


**Also Try [Lex's Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/Lex's-dragons)!**
